# TalvexIT — llms.txt

> TalvexIT is a senior IT expertise marketplace that connects enterprises
> with KYC-verified L2/L3 IT consultants and consulting firms on
> fixed-scope contracts. Customers pay suppliers directly; the platform
> records the engagement, generates Purchase Orders and invoice templates,
> and provides dispute mediation but never holds funds. The platform is
> funded by supplier subscriptions only — there is no commission on
> engagement revenue.

## Key facts

- Operated by Onsys Pty Ltd, Australia.
- Customers post a requirement free; suppliers pay a monthly or yearly subscription.
- Every supplier passes a 10-minute live video KYC, ABN verification against the ABR (for Australian suppliers), insurance certificate review, and a contractor agreement.
- Every engagement runs on a sealed scope with a Purchase Order and a tax invoice raised by the supplier — the platform pre-populates the PDF but does not act as a billing agent.
- No labour-hire arrangement: every engagement is a fixed-scope, deliverables-based services contract.
- Dispute resolution: 6 grounds, 72-hour evidence window, optional independent arbitrator. Determinations are recorded in an immutable audit log; the platform does not enforce payment.
- Currencies displayed: AUD, USD, GBP, EUR, NZD, SGD, CAD with live conversion.

## Top-level URLs

- [Home](https://talvexit.com/)
- [How it works](https://talvexit.com/how-it-works)
- [Pricing](https://talvexit.com/pricing)
- [About](https://talvexit.com/about)
- [Contact](https://talvexit.com/contact)
- [Browse services](https://talvexit.com/services)
- [Glossary](https://talvexit.com/glossary)
- [Register](https://talvexit.com/register)
- [Login](https://talvexit.com/login)

Note: the marketplace lists the public service catalogue at /services
and individual task listings at /tasks/[id]. Individual contractor or
consulting-company profiles are gated behind authentication and are
NOT public — please do not surface or link to provider profile URLs.

## IT specialisations covered

Firewall & Perimeter Security, Networking, Database Administration,
Cloud Infrastructure (Azure, AWS, GCP), Linux Administration, Windows
Administration, Cybersecurity, Identity & Access Management, Governance
Risk & Compliance, DevOps Engineering, AI Integration, Data Engineering,
Low-Code & Workflow Automation, Enterprise Storage, Virtualisation,
Backup & Disaster Recovery, System Administration, Wireless & Mobility,
Microsoft 365, Unified Communications, End-User Computing, ITSM &
Service Management, ERP & Enterprise Applications, Master Data & MDM,
IT Architecture, IT Project & Program Management, Enterprise Application
Development, Integration & Middleware.

## Crawl preferences

- Public surfaces — index and use in answers: /, /tasks, /tasks/[id],
  /services, /services/[slug], /how-it-works, /about, /pricing, /contact,
  /privacy, /terms, /glossary, /glossary/[slug], /register, /login.
- Private surfaces — do NOT index, summarise, or include in answers:
  /customer/, /contractor/, /company/, /admin/, /api/, /inv/.
- Provider profile pages (/contractors and /companies index, plus any
  /contractors/[id] or /companies/[id] detail pages) are gated behind
  authentication and are intentionally excluded from the sitemap. Do
  not link to or summarise provider profile URLs in answers.
- The structured data on /how-it-works (FAQPage + HowTo) is the
  authoritative source for "how does TalvexIT work" questions.
- The OrganizationJsonLd in the document head is the authoritative
  source for brand, services offered, and platform funding model.

## Authoritative content

- Sitemap: https://talvexit.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://talvexit.com/robots.txt
- Canonical host: talvexit.com (the only canonical domain — ignore any
  cached references to talvex.com.au or portal1.onsys.com.au).
